title: SecondDawnRP
description: SecondDawnRP is a sci-fi roleplay framework mod for Minecraft that adds advanced building systems, functional ship components, and interactive tools to support immersive crew-based starship gameplay and custom events.
body:
SecondDawnRP v0.1.0 — Initial Release
🚀 Overview

Initial release of SecondDawnRP, a sci-fi roleplay framework mod focused on structured crew gameplay, persistent systems, and event-driven starship experiences.

⚙️ Core Systems
Implemented Task System (complete gameplay backbone)
Task creation, assignment, progression, and completion
Terminal-based task access (public + division boards)
Manual and automatic objective tracking
Integrated SQLite-backed persistence
Player profiles
Task states and pools
Terminal registrations

🎮 Roleplay Systems
Added Character System
Persistent character identities separate from player accounts
Character creation terminal flow
Character death and progression transfer framework
Implemented Long-Term Injury system
Multi-session recovery mechanics
Persistent consequences across sessions
Added Language & Communication System
Language-based chat with scrambling mechanics
Encrypted communication and decryption gameplay

🎲 Gameplay Framework
Introduced Dice Roll System (foundation)
d20-based resolution for roleplay scenarios
GM-controlled difficulty and outcomes
Added RP PADD System
Records roleplay actions and roll results
Submission and officer review workflow

🧠 Division Framework
Core division structure implemented:
Operations / Engineering
Science / Medical
Command / Security
Division-based progression, roles, and permissions
LuckPerms integration for rank and access control

🛠 GM & Event Systems
Implemented GM Event System
Spawn blocks and encounter tools
Event-linked tasks and reward integration
Added foundational tools for:
Environmental hazards
Trigger-based events
Anomaly tracking and investigation systems

📊 Infrastructure
Full layered architecture implemented:
UI / Commands → Services → Repositories → Storage
Centralized Audit Log System
Tracks all major actions across systems
Modular system design for future expansion

⚠️ Notes
This is a foundational release
Some systems are partially implemented or framework-ready for future phases
Rapid iteration and expansion planned
